title: Bloodalypse
description: Post-apocalyptic, Zombie Invasion discover a new experience in a world where zombies take the disappointment of everything don't die don't get contaminated
body:

# [Chaos Z Pack Lost Cities](https://modrinth.com/mod/chaoszpack-lost-cities)
Chaos Z Pack Lost Cities, is a complementary mod of Lost Cities made for the zombie apocalypse theme this mods requires certain mods which are not installed by default due to their rights of others CurseForge it is requested to install them via the direct links

> - [Horror Elements](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horror-elements-mod/files/6270036)
> 
> - [Zombie Survival Kit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombie-survival-kit/files/6600944)
>
> This list of mods is really recommended for a better experience.
>
> - [Doomsday Decoration](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/doomsday-decoration/files/6781856)
>
> - [Berezka API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berezka-library/files/6846918)
>
> - [SONA SURVIVAL](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sona-survival-101/files/6810083)
## ⚙️ How to Set It Up
1. Select ``testworld`` as the world style when creating a world.
2. Open your Lost Cities profile config:
> 1. File path: ``config/lostcities/profiles/your-profile.json``
> 2. Update the following values: ``your-profile.json "cities":{ "cityStyleAlternative": "citystyle_border1", }, "lostcity": { "buildingMinFloors": 0, "worldStyle": "testworld", }``

</details>

<details>

<summary>🟦⬜🟥French Community🟦⬜🟥</summary>

### Attention !! 🔴
- Ce jeu peut contenir des effets de surprise susceptibles de choquer certains utilisateurs.
- Pour une expérience de jeu optimale, jouez avec des shaders et un casque.

![BLOODALYPSE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8348d05ff876f0c30ef72fa2cfd104d8ba3fadf_0.webp)
200 ans après la terrible explosion de l'usine CRAFORY, un mystérieux virus est apparu un peu partout et a recouvert le monde entier. < Une sorte de zombies ?? > C'est bel et bien vrai et c'est à vous, joueurs, de survivre dans ce monde post-apocalyptique où rien n'évite le danger. Où que vous soyez, les zombies sont là aussi. Vous n'avez qu'une seule option : survivre à l'invasion et ne pas mourir.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6811d02af4154d11f966987479da8b8e4abbe8d_0.webp)

✔️ Entièrement optimisé avec prise en charge des shaders

✔️ Nouveau type de zombie

✔️ IA des monstres améliorée

✔️ Technologie sans dénaturer Minecraft

✔️ Optimisé pour les petites configurations

✔️ 6 Go de RAM minimum

✔️ Mods en constante évolution

✔️ Structure Apocalypse

✔️ +100 mods !

✔️ Nombreuses fonctionnalités personnalisées pour une expérience améliorée
</details>

### Warning !! 🔴
- This game may contain surprise effects that may offend some users.
- For optimal gameplay, play with shaders and headphones.

![BLOODALYPSE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8348d05ff876f0c30ef72fa2cfd104d8ba3fadf_0.webp)
200 years after the terrible explosion of the CRAFORY factory, a mysterious virus has appeared everywhere and covered the entire world. < A kind of zombies?? > It's indeed true and it's up to you, players, who will have to survive in this post-apocalypse world where nothing avoids danger, wherever you are, the zombies are there too. You only have one option: survive the invasion and not die.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6811d02af4154d11f966987479da8b8e4abbe8d_0.webp)

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ New Kind of Zombie

✔️ Improved mob AI

✔️ Technology without distorting Minecraft

✔️ Optimized for small configurations

✔️ 6 GB ram minimum

✔️ Mods in perpetual evolution

✔️ Apocalypse Structure

✔️ +100 Mods !!

✔️ Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience
